question: Which quarter appears to have the best overall restaurant performance based on the stacked area chart?

options.A: Q1 appears best overall based on its combined indicator levels.
options.B: Q2 appears best overall based on its combined indicator levels.
options.C: Q3 appears best overall with the highest total area of indicators.
options.D: The chart cannot determine overall performance accurately because it combines unrelated metrics with different units.

explanation: The chart stacks unrelated metrics (Sales, Kitchen Temperature, etc.) into a cumulative area. These metrics have different units and meanings, so adding them together creates a meaningless total. The stacked area cannot be used to assess overall performance. Only individual metric analysis is valid.
